Notes: UWO ranked 13th in the NCAA Div. III by D3hoops.com...UWO gets 18 points from
Schmidt and 10 off the bench from Moe...UWP gets 11 points from Hansen and 12
off the bench from Meland...UWO led by double figures for the last 29:16 of
the game...UWP scored the last nine points after UWO built a 72-42 lead.
Game.Officials: Greg Gunhus,  Ashley Lax,  Tim Owens
